scope: standalone battle only; no world, mounted, identity, shared tools or code
purpose: remove cross-action identity scale jumps, make dodge read as a side evade, and make revive continuous from the exact unconscious hold

method.source: approved 512px per-action source frames; g16 512px sources retained for counter/stagger/knockaway
method.scale: one deterministic isotropic scale per view/action matched to approved idle using visible height, bbox area and alpha mass
method.anchor: one coherent bottom-center action anchor; dodge uses a deterministic lateral return translation arc
method.revive: exact byte reverse of the repaired/scaled down strip
method.koEye: no RGB repaint: native open concentric faint eye in front down6-8 became readable after scale normalization

skillFringeKnownFailure.reason: low-alpha bright-green pixels exist only in front skill; no exact same-operation per-pixel eligibility mask is persisted, so speculative despill is forbidden

metrics.decision: retained unresolved; no exact per-pixel same-operation eligibility mask is persisted for the low-alpha green pixels
